ui.noCommentHint: No clips to comment on. Complete a highlight analysis first.

ui.coachFeedbackGood: For {{time}} «{{label}}», your decisions looked good. Consider reading teammates’ positions earlier to create better space for the next play.
ui.coachFeedbackDefault: No clip found; you can review shot selection, defensive positioning, and chemistry.
ui.statsTableJumpHint: Rows with › are tappable: opens Highlights & film, filters to that stat, and seeks the first related clip on the timeline.
ui.noClipForStat: No highlight clip matches this stat yet.
ui.pickerNoMatches: No recent matches for this sport
ui.assetFailedHint: Retry or report from task center
ui.reviewCoachIntroDesc: Short notes tied to each moment; numbers are secondary. Focus on actionable cues and drills.
ui.trainPlanDesc: Drills matched to issues from this match. Pro unlocks full library and history.
ui.trainPlanUnlockPro: Upgrade to Pro for full library
ui.recoveryDesc: Last time the app closed unexpectedly. One analysis task ("Friday game") was not finished (45% progress).
ui.playerSummaryDesc: View key player stats, highlights and heatmaps at a glance
ui.commentaryOutlinePro: Open with team records and key matchups, then highlight pace changes and offensive/defensive efficiency in this game.
ui.commentaryOutlinePassion: This game was on fire—attack after attack, and the key possessions were pure willpower.
ui.commentaryOutlineFun: Like a weekend run turned up: one side "never defends", the other "happy shooting".
ui.socialCopyPro1: [Tactical] One game to understand pace, space and decisions—key plays frame by frame.
ui.socialCopyPro2: Data + visuals, great to share with teammates for film.
ui.socialCopyPassion1: [Highlights] This one was all goals and blocks. Every possession worth a replay.
ui.socialCopyPassion2: Perfect for WeChat / Xiaohongshu with a 30s AI highlight reel.
ui.socialCopyFun1: [Weekend watch] A crew pretending to be pro, really just making memes for the feed.
ui.socialCopyFun2: Copy in one tap, pair with memes and short clips for best effect.
ui.heatmapDescSoccer: Heatmap shows the player's activity intensity and shot locations on the pitch.
ui.heatmapDescBasketball: Heatmap shows the player's shot locations and shooting efficiency.
ui.aigcChangeBgDesc: Pick a highlight clip and AI will change the background and add elements.
ui.aigcComposedWithCommentary: Composed scene + AI commentary track for this clip.
ui.aigcAppliedBg: AI has applied background and elements to the selected clip.
ui.aigcCommentaryOverlay: AI has applied commentary track and edited footage for this clip.
ui.aigcCommentarySocial: AI has overlaid commentary and edits—ideal for tactical highlight clips on social.
ui.aiCoachAigcDesc: Tactical and performance commentary for a single highlight clip.
ui.selectClipForCoach: Select a highlight clip for detailed commentary:
ui.resultEffectDesc: Reference social cover style, auto overlay score, teams and effects.
ui.exportResultNote: Exported video will be generated from selected clips and parameters.
ui.devScenarioDesc: Pick a scenario and the app will simulate it.
ui.devScenarioDeviceDisconnectDesc: Falcon loses power in the middle of download.
ui.devScenarioConcurrentDesc: Only one analysis task can run at a time.
ui.devScenarioOfflineDesc: Simulate a pause when there is no network.
ui.devScenarioStorageDesc: Check storage before starting a task.
ui.devScenarioQueueFullDesc: Simulate 5 tasks already analyzing in cloud.

tutorial.dualModeDesc: Left: generate highlights. Right: pro analysis (Pro).
tutorial.projectDesc: Recent projects, templates, or continue editing

aiComment.soccerGoals2: {{name}} was clinical today with a brace to seal it.
aiComment.soccerNoGoalBad: {{name}} had a quiet day in front of goal.
aiComment.soccerNoGoalOk: {{name}} didn’t finish but movement and involvement were good.
aiComment.soccerAssist2: Two assists; the playmaker ran the show.
aiComment.soccerAssist1: Key assist to link the attack.
aiComment.soccerKeyPasses: No assist but constant key passes; the engine in attack.
aiComment.soccerSprints: Sprint count was elite; pressing and counter-pressing on point.
aiComment.soccerDefenseHigh: Defensive presence was huge; interceptions and tackles everywhere.
aiComment.soccerDefenseMid: Did the dirty work and held the line.
aiComment.soccerXgLow: Below xG but delivered when it mattered.
aiComment.soccerDefault: {{name}} was solid on both sides of the ball today.
aiComment.basketballPts30: {{name}} went off for {{pts}} and looked like the best player on the floor.
aiComment.basketballPts20: {{name}} was efficient with {{pts}} and the go-to option on offense.
aiComment.basketballPts10: {{name}} chipped in {{pts}} and held it down on offense.
aiComment.basketballEfgHigh: Elite eFG%; shot selection was sharp.
aiComment.basketballEfgLow: Rough shooting day but the film will show the looks.
aiComment.basketballReb10: Crashed the glass and owned the paint.
aiComment.basketballReb7: Solid on the boards and held the line.
aiComment.basketballAst8: Ran the offense and set the tempo.
aiComment.basketballDef4: Disruptive on D with steals and blocks.
aiComment.basketballDef2: Active on D and made the right plays.
aiComment.basketballTovHigh: Too many turnovers; the other side will take those.

postRecord.title: Your highlights & insights
postRecord.subtitle: After upload we auto-detect moments, apply templates, and keep everything in My library.

taskSubmitted.processingDesc: We’re pulling usable clips from your video; then you can review, compose, and share.
taskSubmitted.cloudCardDesc: Upload for share-ready films and data reports—track progress in the task center.

compose.sheetDesc: Auto-picks strong moments with intro, pacing, and captions (demo).
compose.proSheetDesc: 7 templates: 2 standard + 2 Pro story/brand + 3 cinema-grade beat & polish packs; higher default bitrate (demo).
compose.descFullGame: Auto-chains scores and key plays—tight pacing for quick shares.
compose.descSpotlight: Prioritizes tagged player moments with personal stats emphasis.
compose.descRecap: Intro/outro, chapter captions, longer runtime—great for recap and parents.
compose.descBrand: Swap logo, voiceover slot, and end CTA—clubs and camps.
compose.descBeatsPro: Cuts and slow-mo aligned to music—built for short-form social.
compose.descCinematic: Teal-orange look, light narration slots—showcase and recruiting.
compose.descSignaturePack: Unified bumper, match title cards, and stats end-slate across events.

toolbox.screenTagline: Highlights, stats review, and templates in one place.
toolbox.entryOneTapFilmDesc: Pick a game and let the cloud build your highlight reel.
toolbox.entryManualEditDesc: Open clips to tweak duration, event type, and markers.
toolbox.entryMergeExportDesc: Select multiple clips, merge, then save or share.
toolbox.entryTemplateFilmDesc: Apply full-game, spotlight, or recap templates.
toolbox.mergeExportHint: Multi-select is on—pick clips, then use merge / export in the bar below.
toolbox.manualEditHint: Tap a clip card to edit duration, type, and player tags.
toolbox.templatesSectionHint: Curated film templates—apply after you upload a match.
toolbox.templatesMoreToast: More categories and creator packs are coming soon.
toolbox.templateApplyHint: Preference saved—use it in the film step after upload.
toolbox.qtDesc1: Pro report layout for post-game sharing.
toolbox.qtDesc2: Beat-sync cuts for soccer and basketball.
toolbox.qtDesc4: Auto-picks the best moments into one reel.
toolbox.qtDesc5: Spotlight cuts built around your key player.

basicTrain.reviewIntro: Notes below tie to each moment; improvement themes roll up into the weekly plan as simple text cues.
basicTrain.weeklySub: Grouped from detected improvement themes in your clips—text only on Basic; no paid follow-along videos.
basicTrain.weeklyEmpty: No themes to summarize yet—capture more highlights first.
basicTrain.proVideoNote: Follow-along videos and the full library are Pro.
basicTrain.hintShotSelection: Add 2–3 short sessions of catch-and-shoot or defender reads (~15m), prioritizing release rhythm.
basicTrain.hintSpacing: Work weak-side catches and mid-range stops; scan helpers before you go.
basicTrain.hintRoutine: Lock dribbles + breath before every FT; chase streaks with minimal motion.
basicTrain.hintFinishing: Mix side-foot and chip finishes near the goal; plant foot and eyes on the keeper.
basicTrain.hintSetPiece: Agree near/far runs on corners; drill roles for 10 minutes each.
basicTrain.hintTransition: After winning the ball, forward in three passes—first touch direction first, tempo second.

proReel.studioQualityBody: Vs Basic: higher export bitrate, optional intros/chapter cards, and beat-sync editing (demo).

coach.tip3pt: Rhythm is clean—when the defender is late, fire; catch in stance for balance.
coach.tipMid: On mid-range looks, peek weak side for a better pass before rising.
coach.tipFt: Lock a simple routine: breaths, dribbles, then release—fewer moving parts.
coach.tip3ptB: With real gravity outside, run more pick actions to widen the floor.
coach.tipSoccerGoal: Before finishing, scan the keeper; tight angle favors far post.
coach.tipCorner: Call runs early—near flick, back post crash, and central blocks split roles.
coach.tipSoccerGoal2: In transition, value pass quality before forcing the final ball.

training.bbCatchShootDesc: One-motion threes off the catch—feet set, quick release.
training.bbMidDesc: Hard stop, lift through contact, read the defender’s hips.
training.bbFtDesc: Same dribbles and breath every time; chase streaks, not hero shots.
training.scFinishDesc: Keeper narrowing the angle—side-foot vs chip, plant foot first.
training.scCornerDesc: Near flick, back-post crash, central block—rotate jobs.
training.scCounterDesc: After winning the ball, forward in three passes—first touch direction matters.

trainingPlans.sectionHint: Free samples and a paid catalog placeholder—full packs and training data can plug in later.
trainingPlans.toastPreview: Preview opens soon—you can save this plan for now.
trainingPlans.toastPaid: Paid training library placeholder—unlock for full series and synced training data.
trainingPlans.toastProMemberSample: Pro active: opening curated follow-along preview (demo).
trainingPlans.toastProMemberFull: Pro active: opening full premium drill session (demo).
trainingPlans.previewPlayerBody: The production build will stream HD video with chapter markers; this screen demos controls and progress.
trainingPlans.bbPlan1Focus: Feet set, one-motion tempo—great after games to groove shots.
trainingPlans.bbPlan2Focus: Finish through contact—guide hand and shoulder angles.
trainingPlans.bbPlan3Focus: Angle, snake, and late kick—full version lives in the paid library.
trainingPlans.bbPlan4Focus: Close-out angles and recoveries—team rotation primer.
trainingPlans.scPlan1Focus: Half-turn receipts, open hips—clean links through midfield.
trainingPlans.scPlan2Focus: Plant foot, scan the keeper, side-foot vs chip.
trainingPlans.scPlan3Focus: Body shielding and pre-scan—beat the high press (paid series).
trainingPlans.scPlan4Focus: Transition choices and width—full tactical pack unlocks later.

proReviewTab.timelineHint: Tap an event to sync the timeline; use Multi-select to export chosen clips.
proReviewTab.statsJumpSummary: How do stats rows jump to highlights?
proReviewTab.heatmapHint: Pick a player for a personal view; otherwise see team-wide context.

proTrainReview.sectionSub: Follow-along videos are included with Pro—watch full premium drills when subscribed; text cues stay for reference.
proTrainReview.catalogSub: Samples and full programs are part of Pro—tap a card for full-screen follow-along preview.
proTrainReview.unlockVideosHint: Subscribe to Pro to watch the premium follow-along videos below.
proTrainReview.memberVideosHint: Pro is active—follow-along videos are included; tap a card to play (demo).
proTrainReview.proReportVideosHint: This is the full Pro report—follow-along videos are included; tap a card for the full-screen player (demo).

proExport.title: Pro exports
proExport.desc: PDF reports and Excel tables for archives and sharing (demo).

matchReport.sessionDescBasic: Key moments, share-ready films, and coaching notes on one page.
matchReport.sessionDescPro: Vs Basic: full event timeline, player filters, multi-template films, and a dedicated Review & data tab; film preview is first on Highlights.
matchReport.sectionCoachDesc: Pick a moment for a short note and recommended drills.
